title: chrysanthemum pulverulentum
intro: Chrysanthemum pulverulentum, also known as dusty chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is native to China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum pulverulentum include reducing fever, relieving headaches and migraines, and improving respiratory health by alleviating symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. Chrysanthemum pulverulentum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used as a medicinal powder.
